top_signals.title: PBOC Sets Fixing Below 6.8 Per Dollar for First Time Since 2023
top_signals.summary: China’s central bank set the yuan’s daily reference rate stronger than 6.80 per dollar for the first time since 2023, reinforcing expectations that policymakers are comfortable with the currency’s strength.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan, Citi Bankers to Join Hong Kong Exchange Listing Panel
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Nelly Pai and Citigroup Inc.’s Alexander Schrantz are joining the Hong Kong stock exchange panel responsible for approving initial public offerings, according to people familiar with the matter, as the city sharpens its scrutiny of deal quality.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
